query: Given a ground sampling distance (GSD) of 0.1257 meters/pixel, determine the center-to-center distance (in meters, rounded to the nearest whole number) between the playground with blue slides and the nearest swimming pool.
final_answer: The center-to-center distance between the playground with blue slides and the nearest swimming pool is approximately 41 meters.

evaluation.question: Is the stated distance within the range of 36 to 45. meters?
